summary: The implementation successfully delivers the core Documentation & Cyber Services page with most requirements fulfilled. The frontend components (DocumentationPage, service request form, admin management) are implemented with proper routing and styling. Backend data models, CRUD operations with admin access control, and React Query hooks are all present. However, some frontend UI sections specified in requirements REQ-15 through REQ-20 appear to be truncated in the diff, making complete verification impossible for those specific sections.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add How It Works section with three steps: Step 1 'Submit your request online', Step 2 'Our team verifies documents', Step 3 'Service completed or visit scheduled', displayed with icons and step numbers
missing_requirements.reason: The DocumentationPage.tsx file is truncated after the service categories section. Cannot verify if the How It Works section with three steps exists in the full implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement Why Choose The Cyber Point section displaying five features: Trusted Local Service, Affordable Charges, Fast Processing, Experienced Operators, Secure Document Handling
missing_requirements.reason: The DocumentationPage.tsx file is truncated. Cannot verify if Why Choose The Cyber Point section with all five features is implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add Terms & Conditions section displaying all specified terms: service charges non-refundable after submission, government fees separate, approval depends on authority, incorrect information user responsibility, processing time may vary, Aadhaar services require physical presence
missing_requirements.reason: The DocumentationPage.tsx file is truncated. Cannot verify if Terms & Conditions section with all six terms is present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add Privacy Policy note section stating 'User documents are kept confidential and used only for service processing'
missing_requirements.reason: The DocumentationPage.tsx file is truncated. Cannot verify if Privacy Policy note is displayed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add floating WhatsApp button to Documentation page (similar to existing WhatsAppButton component) with auto-message 'Hello, I want documentation service from StudyNeeds' and position it to not overlap with existing site-wide WhatsApp button
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of a page-specific floating WhatsApp button in DocumentationPage.tsx. The file shows WhatsApp button in CTA section but not a dedicated floating button that avoids overlap with the existing site-wide WhatsAppButton component.
